title: Evangelion Maid Fetish Coffee Pachinko
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion + Maid Fetish + Coffee + Pachinko...             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Feb 12, 2008 4:59 pm ...It was inevitable.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Tue Feb 12, 2008 5:05 pm Cool. I don''t even like coffee and I want a can.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 12, 2008 5:30 pm I have a regular UCC can (the updated one for Rebuild, not the original series one ; ) of Shinji. Now I want one of Shinji in a maid outfit. Wait, what? Anyway, this is interesting. I can only imagine how those two would react: Rei, in her maid outfit: "It's fine. It comes with the job." Asuka, in hers, covering herself: "Why do I have to wear this?! It's stupid! *Whine*"

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Feb 12, 2008 5:38 pm Ritsuko wrote: You mean the nipples? You'll be more appreciated by our audience this way.

[]:             Quote Post by majlund » Tue Feb 12, 2008 5:58 pm Haha - "After the End" is great fun :)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Feb 12, 2008 7:43 pm I WANT ONE. Not really, I don't like coffee. If it were juice, maybe.

[]: NICE             Quote Post by MexiChrist » Wed Feb 13, 2008 1:13 am I love random eva merchandise! these would compliment my eva doritos nicely! Are they for sale yet???
